headline: Rithm Capital CEO Michael Nierenberg: Our stock is extremely undervalued right now

headline: Apollo Global Management (APO) Valuation Check After Mixed Returns And Conflicting P/E And DCF Signals
summary: Apollo Global Management (APO) is drawing investor attention after recent trading left the shares around $123.33, with performance mixed across timeframes, including a monthly gain and declines over the past 3 months and over the past year. See our latest analysis for Apollo Global Management. Recent trading highlights that momentum has cooled, with the 30 day share price return of 13.8% standing against a 90 day share price decline of 6.4% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 8.2% in the...
